arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk's one-word Liverpool fear ahead of Newcastle United Carabao Cup final clash
arts.sum: Liverpool were shocked by the approach of Howe's men that evening under the lights and their captain Virgil van Dijk has warned his team-mates that they must prepare for another 'intense' experience. Newcastle United will face Liverpool in the Carabao Cup Final after the Reds disposed of Tottenham Hotspur in their semi-final second leg at Anfield.

arts.ttl: FA Cup predictions: Birmingham to spring Newcastle shock?
arts.sum: Our betting expert Jones Knows provides his insight as he analyses the weekend's FA Cup fourth-round action and makes a case for Birmingham to beat Newcastle.

arts.ttl: Van Nistelrooy, Lampard, Howe - FA Cup goals by current bosses
arts.sum: Watch a collection of FA Cup goals scored by players turned managers who are taking charge of sides in the fourth round this weekend.

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal target England international wanted by Tottenham Hotspur and Newcastle United
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly preparing to make a move for Crystal Palace captain Marc Guehi in the summer transfer window, as Mikel Arteta looks to further strengthen his defensive options ahead of next season. With the Gunners competing on multiple fronts, Arteta is keen to add depth to his backline. Gabriel Magalhaes and William Saliba have […] The post Report: Arsenal target England international wanted by Tottenham Hotspur and Newcastle United appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Revealed: How long Gabriel Martinelli 'will be out of action' for after suffering hamstring against Newcastle as Arsenal are dealt fresh injury blow
arts.sum: Martinelli went down clutching his hamstring in the 37th minute at St James' Park during the Gunners' Carabao Cup semi-final second leg defeat on Tuesday evening.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United told they can cause Carabao Cup 'upset' against Liverpool on one condition
arts.sum: Newcastle United's opponents have been confirmed for a showpiece Carabao Cup final in March, as Liverpool thumped Tottenham Hotspur in their semi-final second leg - and some fans in the Chronicle Live comments section say that this is the perfect opportunity to winning some silverware. Meanwhile, Liverpool will be looking to retain the trophy having won the competition last season, claiming their 11th League Cup title and the first piece of silverware under Arne Slot.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United braced for summer transfer blow as striker in 'advanced talks'
arts.sum: Newcastle United-linked Jonathan David is reportedly in advanced talks to join Barcelona in the summer. The forward said: "It’s not like the beginning of a season where you have a pre-season you get to know your team-mates, you have time to gel.

arts.ttl: Newcastle defender Kelly joins Juventus on loan
arts.sum: Newcastle United defender Lloyd Kelly joins Juventus in a loan deal with an obligation to make the move permanent for £20m in the summer.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United transfer decision justified as Manchester United 'mess' forgotten
arts.sum: "The feeling the two years ago was a bit strange; for me, it was a mess but now I'm there with the team, playing the games, and I can make some impact that can affect the games as well," Dubravka told Newcastle's official media channels after Wednesday's win over Arsenal. The feeling around St James' Park and the club's Benton base is clearly having an effect on Dubravka, who believes this current dressing room may be the best he's ever been a part of.

arts.ttl: Chris Davies says what he really thinks about Eddie Howe before warning Newcastle United
arts.sum: “I’ve come across Eddie when I’ve been assistant manager of teams and I think he’s a top coach,” said Davies. The Blues boss also thinks Howe, 47, should have been the FA’s go-to candidate to replace Gareth Southgate in the England hot-seat.
